name: AI Weekly Skincare Trend-to-Content Generator for Instagram Reels

parameters.text:
=You are a senior social media strategist for D2C skincare brands.

Brand Details:
Brand Name: GlowCare
Brand Category: Skincare D2C Brand
Target Audience: Women aged 18-35 interested in skincare, beauty, glow routines, and self-care
Brand Tone: Friendly, premium, simple, educational
Main Product: Vitamin C Face Serum

RSS Trend Articles:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.trends) }}

Task:
Generate exactly 7 Instagram Reel content ideas for this D2C skincare brand.

For each idea, include:
- Posting Day
- Content Idea
- Reel Hook
- Suggested Caption
- Suggested Hashtags
- Reel Format
- Why This Works

Rules:
- Use the RSS articles as trend inspiration.
- Ignore irrelevant or spammy articles.
- Do not copy article titles directly.
- Make ideas useful for a founder asking: “What should we post next?”
- Captions should be ready to use.
- Keep the language simple.
- Output clean markdown only.
- Do not output JSON.

Format:

## Idea 1
Posting Day:
Content Idea:
Hook:
Caption:
Hashtags:
Format:
Why This Works:

## Idea 2
Posting Day:
Content Idea:
Hook:
Caption:
Hashtags:
Format:
Why This Works:

Continue until Idea 7.

parameters.content:
# Step 1: Weekly Content Schedule

This node automatically starts the workflow every week.

## How It Works

The Schedule Trigger runs the workflow based on the configured schedule.

In this workflow, it is set to run weekly on Monday at 8 AM.

# Step 2: Get Trends

This node collects recent skincare trend articles from Google News RSS.

## How It Works

The RSS Feed Read node reads a Google News RSS URL.

The RSS URL searches for skincare-related topics such as:

- Skincare trends
- Skincare routine
- Skincare tips

It also focuses on articles from the last 7 days.

# Step 3: Top 7 Trends

This node keeps only the first 7 trend articles from the RSS results.

## How It Works

The RSS node can return many articles.

The Limit node reduces the number of items and allows only 7 articles to continue in the workflow.

# Step 4: Combine Trends

This node combines all selected trend articles into one single field.

## How It Works

Normally, n8n handles each RSS article as a separate item.

The Aggregate node collects all 7 article items and stores them together inside a field called `trends`.

# Step 5: Generate 7 Instagram Reel Ideas

This node uses AI to turn the combined skincare trend data into 7 ready-to-use Instagram Reel ideas.

It sends the trend articles to the OpenAI Chat Model with a prompt that asks the AI to act as a D2C skincare content strategist for GlowCare.

For each Reel idea, the AI generates:

- Posting Day
- Content Idea
- Hook
- Caption
- Hashtags
- Reel Format
- Why It Works

# Step 6: Save Ideas to Content Calendar

This node saves the AI-generated Reel ideas into a Notion content calendar.

It creates a new Notion database page with a dynamic title using the current date, such as:

Weekly Skincare Content Ideas - 19 May 2026

The content is split into two blocks using .slice() to avoid Notion’s text length limit.

# Workflow Overview

### This workflow automatically creates weekly Instagram Reel ideas for a D2C skincare brand using fresh Google News trends.

### It runs every week, fetches recent skincare-related articles, selects the top 7 trend items, combines them into one dataset, and sends them to AI.

### The AI generates 7 ready-to-use Instagram Reel ideas with hooks, captions, hashtags, reel format, and explanation.

### Finally, the generated weekly content plan is saved into a Notion content calendar.
